name: iceberg-clickhouse
description: Query Apache Iceberg tables in ClickHouse via a named collection

aws_access_key_id.title: AWS Access Key ID
aws_access_key_id.description: Access key for the S3 bucket containing your Iceberg table

aws_secret_access_key.title: AWS Secret Access Key
aws_secret_access_key.description: Secret key for the S3 bucket containing your Iceberg table

path.title: Iceberg Table Path
path.description: S3 path to your Iceberg table metadata

errorMessage.pattern: Must be an S3 URI (e.g. s3://bucket/warehouse/my_table)

files.name: connector
files.code_template:
# Connector YAML
# Reference documentation: [[ .docs_url ]]
type: connector
driver: iceberg
[[ renderProps .config_props ]]

files.name: model
files.code_template:
# Model YAML
# Reference documentation: https://docs.rilldata.com/reference/project-files/models
type: model
materialize: true
connector: clickhouse
sql: |
  SELECT * FROM icebergS3(rill_[[ .connector_name ]], url='[[ s3ToHTTPS .path ]]')
